recommendations.title: Black Mirror: Bandersnatch
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Mystery, Drama, Horror, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a young programmer begins to question reality as he adapts a dark fantasy novel into a video game. A mind-bending tale with multiple endings.

recommendations.title: Dark Harvest
recommendations.overview: In a small Midwestern town, a deadly annual ritual unfolds when the mythical nightmare, Sawtooth Jack, rises from the cornfields and challenges the town’s teenage boys in a bloody battle of survival.

recommendations.title: Hard Candy
recommendations.overview: Hayley’s a smart, charming teenage girl. Jeff’s a handsome, smooth fashion photographer. An Internet chat, a coffee shop meet-up, an impromptu fashion shoot back at Jeff’s place. Jeff thinks it’s his lucky night. He’s in for a surprise.

recommendations.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
recommendations.overview: Forks, Washington resident Bella Swan is reeling from the departure of her vampire love, Edward Cullen, and finds comfort in her friendship with Jacob Black, a werewolf. But before she knows it, she's thrust into a centuries-old conflict, and her des

recommendations.title: 30 Days of Night
recommendations.overview: This is the story of an isolated Alaskan town that is plunged into darkness for a month each year when the sun sinks below the horizon. As the last rays of light fade, the town is attacked by a bloodthirsty gang of vampires bent on an uninterrupted o

recommendations.title: Vampire Sisters 2: Bats in the Belly
recommendations.overview: Teen half vampire Dakaria falls in love with rock singer vampire Murdo. Dakaria, her friends and family have to face vampire Xantor who has dark plans.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Cinema
recommendations.overview: A series of down-on-their-luck individuals enter the decrepit and spine-chilling Rialto theater, only to have their deepest and darkest fears brought to life on the silver screen by The Projectionist – a mysterious, ghostly figure who holds the night
recommendations.director: Ryuhei Kitamura, Alejandro Brugués, Mick Garris, David Slade, Joe Dante

recommendations.title: Samsara
recommendations.overview: A love story situated in the Himalayas. A Buddhist monk can't choose between life and the way of the Buddha.

recommendations.title: Twilight
recommendations.overview: When Bella Swan moves to a small town in the Pacific Northwest, she falls in love with Edward Cullen, a mysterious classmate who reveals himself to be a 108-year-old vampire. Despite Edward's repeated cautions, Bella can't stay away from him, a fatal

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.
